critical_issues.title: Extremely High Kitchen Times Causing Service Delays
critical_issues.root_cause: Two orders on Feb 25-26 show kitchen times of 1369 and 2099 minutes (22-35 hours), indicating orders left open overnight or system timing errors. This suggests critical order management/closure process failures.
critical_issues.impact: ₹67700 potential revenue at risk from 2 orders
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement mandatory order closure protocols at end-of-shift, add automated alerts for orders exceeding 90 minutes, and train staff on proper order completion procedures in POS system.

critical_issues.title: High Order Cancellation Rate
critical_issues.root_cause: 6 orders cancelled during the period (Jan 28 data) representing ₹143,400 in lost revenue. No cancellation data visible for rest of period, suggesting incomplete tracking or data entry issues.
critical_issues.recommendation: Mandate cancellation reason capture in POS, analyze root causes (kitchen capacity, ingredient shortage, customer wait time), and implement preventive measures. Establish cancellation rate KPI threshold of <2%.

critical_issues.title: Critical Low Stock on High-Demand Items
critical_issues.root_cause: 7 materials critically low: Fish Fillet (1,341/52,452), Egg (200/2,232), Burger Bun (99/1,498), Dosa Batter (452/17,700), Capsicum (613/27,532), Green Chili (1,645/56,924). These ingredients appear in 40%+ of menu items.
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement automated reorder triggers at 20% of max stock, establish daily inventory checks for critical items, and create backup supplier relationships for high-velocity ingredients.

critical_issues.title: Missing Kitchen Time Data for 93% of Orders
critical_issues.root_cause: Only 66 out of 337 total orders have kitchen time recorded. Majority of orders from Jan 29 onwards show no completion timestamps or kitchen time metrics, indicating POS workflow not being followed.
critical_issues.impact: Unable to track efficiency, identify bottlenecks, or optimize staffing
critical_issues.recommendation: Mandatory staff training on order lifecycle management, implement kitchen display system (KDS) integration, and add order completion step to kitchen workflow with accountability tracking.

critical_issues.title: High Inventory Holding Value Without Rotation Strategy
critical_issues.root_cause: ₹9.4M total inventory value with multiple items at 20-50% of max capacity, suggesting over-ordering on some items while others are critically low. No FIFO/expiry management visible for perishables.
critical_issues.impact: ₹150000/month estimated waste from spoilage and tied capital
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement ABC inventory classification, reduce order quantities for slow-moving items by 30%, establish FIFO protocols, and conduct weekly expiry audits for all perishables (23 items have 2-7 day shelf life).

critical_issues.title: Inconsistent Order Status Tracking
critical_issues.root_cause: Mix of status values (ready, pending, completed, sent_to_kitchen, in_progress) with no standardization. Some completed orders show 'pending' item status, indicating workflow breakdown between order level and item level tracking.
critical_issues.impact: Service delays, customer complaints, staff confusion
critical_issues.recommendation: Standardize order workflow to 4 states only (received→preparing→ready→completed), implement automated status transitions, and create visual dashboard for kitchen staff showing real-time order status.

critical_issues.title: Untracked Discount and Revenue Leakage
critical_issues.root_cause: No discount data visible in financial records despite standard industry practice of 5-10% promotional offers. Either discounts aren't being tracked in system or no promotional strategy exists.
critical_issues.impact: Unknown revenue impact, inability to measure promotion ROI
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement discount code tracking in POS, establish approval workflow for discounts >10%, and create monthly discount analysis report to measure effectiveness and prevent unauthorized discounting.

critical_issues.title: Peak Hour Kitchen Overload
critical_issues.root_cause: Average kitchen time of 32 minutes across tracked orders, with peaks of 40-45 minutes during 12-2 PM and 7-9 PM periods. Order volume concentrates in these windows without capacity adjustment.
critical_issues.impact: Customer dissatisfaction, increased cancellations during peak times
critical_issues.recommendation: Add prep cook during lunch (11 AM-3 PM) and dinner (6-10 PM) rush, implement mise en place protocols for high-volume items, and create expeditor role to coordinate order flow during peak periods.
